attr.title: Zenodeath
attr.desc: Zenodeath is the final entry in the Zeno series, the final evolution, featuring a modern OST by HeavyViper and two gameplay types.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam and copy all game files into the assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/761920/Zenodeath/) and copy all game files into the `assets` folder.
